notes: Multiple critical bugs: undeclared gameOverBlink variable causes crash on game over, duplicate function definitions with UFO property naming mismatch (shot vs shootT) breaks UFO shooting, and dead code throughout from overridden functions.

The game suffers from duplicated/overwritten functions which break UFO behavior (it never shoots or changes direction due to mismatched property names) and causes a fatal ReferenceError crash on Game Over.
It resembles Asteroids visually, but duplicated/redefined core functions and state logic likely cause inconsistent gameplay behavior, scoring bugs, broken flow, and high risk of runtime/logic errors.
